news.title:
Bajaj Holdings fell 3.9% this week to Rs.9,149.15, underperforming Sensex's 1.5% drop.
52-week low, technical downgrades, and high derivatives activity drove bearish sentiment.
news.summary:
Bajaj Holdings fell 3.9% this week to Rs.9,149.15, underperforming Sensex's 1.5% drop.
52-week low, technical downgrades, and high derivatives activity drove bearish sentiment.

news.title:
Bajaj Holdings hits 52-week low of Rs.9695.05 amid market weakness.
Shares drop for 3 days, posting a cumulative loss of 5.3%.
news.summary:
Bajaj Holdings hits 52-week low of Rs.9695.05 amid market weakness.
Shares drop for 3 days, posting a cumulative loss of 5.3%.

news.title:
Allianz SE exited Bajaj Finserv insurance subsidiaries by selling 3% stake.
Bajaj Holdings' stake rose from 17.56% to 18.1% via buyback participation.
news.summary:
Allianz SE exited Bajaj Finserv insurance subsidiaries by selling 3% stake.
Bajaj Holdings' stake rose from 17.56% to 18.1% via buyback participation.

news.title:
Bajaj Holdings sees a 15% rise in open interest despite price underperformance.
Rising volumes and downtrend indicate evolving market positioning by traders.
news.summary:
Bajaj Holdings sees a 15% rise in open interest despite price underperformance.
Rising volumes and downtrend indicate evolving market positioning by traders.

news.title:
Bajaj Holdings sees a 10.2% rise in derivatives open interest, indicating higher market activity.
Despite a modest price dip, rising OI and delivery volumes suggest shifting market sentiment.
news.summary:
Bajaj Holdings sees a 10.2% rise in derivatives open interest, indicating higher market activity.

news.title:
Indian holding companies like Kama Holdings and Bajaj Holdings trade at 30-90% discounts to NAV due to taxes, limited minority control, and liquidity issues.
Kama trades at a PE of 9.6, Bajaj at 17.2, both below industry averages. Discounts also depend on market cycles and promoter dominance.
news.summary:
Indian holding companies like Kama Holdings and Bajaj Holdings trade at 30-90% discounts to NAV due to taxes, limited minority control, and liquidity issues.
Kama trades at a PE of 9.6, Bajaj at 17.2, both below industry averages. Discounts also depend on market cycles and promoter dominance.

news.title:
Bajaj Holdings Q3 and 9M results show 9M profit before tax at ₹2,968.7 crore.
Exceptional income of ₹1,983 crore from Bajaj Finserv share sale; tax credit ₹78.4 crore.
news.summary:
Bajaj Holdings Q3 and 9M results show 9M profit before tax at ₹2,968.7 crore.
Exceptional income of ₹1,983 crore from Bajaj Finserv share sale; tax credit ₹78.4 crore.

news.title:
Bajaj Holdings & Investment Ltd hit a 52-week low of Rs.10,475.
The decline reflects market pressures and sectoral weakness amid index reversal.
news.summary:
Bajaj Holdings & Investment Ltd hit a 52-week low of Rs.10,475.

news.title:
Bajaj Holdings' CIO Purav Jhaveri resigned on Jan 31, 2026, for external career opportunities.
The company disclosed his resignation, ending his senior management role.
news.summary:

news.title:

The stock outperformed Sensex, which fell 2.6%, showing resilience amid volatility.

news.title:
Bajaj Holdings & Investment Ltd acquires 17.56% equity in Bajaj General and Bajaj Life from Allianz SE.
Bajaj Finserv and Jamnalal Sons also acquired stakes; collective holding now 97% in both companies.
news.summary:
Bajaj Holdings & Investment Ltd acquires 17.56% equity in Bajaj General and Bajaj Life from Allianz SE.
Bajaj Finserv and Jamnalal Sons also acquired stakes; collective holding now 97% in both companies.

news.title:

news.title:
HFCL, NCC, Titagarh Rail Systems, and Cyient exit F&O segment.
Swiggy, Waaree Energies, Premier Energies, and Bajaj Holdings enter F&O segment.
news.summary:
HFCL, NCC, Titagarh Rail Systems, and Cyient exit F&O segment.
Swiggy, Waaree Energies, Premier Energies, and Bajaj Holdings enter F&O segment.

news.title:
NSE to launch F&O contracts on Bajaj Holdings, Premier Energies, Swiggy, Waaree Energies from Dec 31, 2025.
NSE reported Q2FY26 income of ₹4,160 crore; PAT rose 16% QoQ, maintaining dominance in equity and debt markets.
news.summary:
NSE to launch F&O contracts on Bajaj Holdings, Premier Energies, Swiggy, Waaree Energies from Dec 31, 2025.
NSE reported Q2FY26 income of ₹4,160 crore; PAT rose 16% QoQ, maintaining dominance in equity and debt markets.

news.title:
Sensex dropped 120.2 pts to 84,559.6; Nifty fell 41.6 pts to 25,818.6, amid FPI outflows, rupee weakness.
Key updates: NTPC's solar ops, Paytm's RBI nod, Maruti's case postponed, Bajaj enters solar, Jio's new COO.
news.summary:
Sensex dropped 120.2 pts to 84,559.6; Nifty fell 41.6 pts to 25,818.6, amid FPI outflows, rupee weakness.
Key updates: NTPC's solar ops, Paytm's RBI nod, Maruti's case postponed, Bajaj enters solar, Jio's new COO.

news.title:
Public companies own 55% of Bajaj Finance, with Bajaj Finserv holding 51%, giving them significant influence.
Institutions own 23%, while the general public holds 20%. Insiders own less than 1% of the company's shares.
news.summary:
Public companies own 55% of Bajaj Finance, with Bajaj Finserv holding 51%, giving them significant influence.
Institutions own 23%, while the general public holds 20%. Insiders own less than 1% of the company's shares.
